name: research-rigor
description: A rigor toolkit for researchers and research engineers. Find prior art before you build (prior-art-check), run a defensible literature search (research-papers), and harden a spec, plan, diff, or document to genuine convergence with diverse adversarial critics (convergent-review). Ships the oracle and council critic agents. External search providers (Exa, GitHub, OpenAlex, and more) are optional and auto-detected, with graceful fallback to built-in tools.
